pi_items.source: Verified from setup_task.sh which targets world_survey.gpkg for modification.
Verified via setup_task.sh which explicitly injects these names using sqlite3 updates on the world_capitals table.

Verified by reading the unmodified data/world_survey.gpkg SQLite database, confirming the true names for France, Japan, and Australia are Paris, Tokyo, and Canberra, which are modified to the corrupted names in setup_task.sh.
Verified via setup_task.sh which copies the database to this exact directory.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real-world geographic data (world_survey.gpkg). Before the task starts, setup_task.sh intentionally corrupts the names of three capitals in the world_capitals table: Paris (France) becomes Target_Alpha, Tokyo (Japan) becomes Target_Bravo, and Canberra (Australia) becomes Target_Charlie. The database is correctly placed at /sdcard/Android/data/ch.opengis.qfield/files/Imported Datasets/world_survey.gpkg. The agent must successfully revert these three records back to Paris, Tokyo, and Canberra to pass.
